title: mini project session flow
goal: Wire the full /mini:project (Part 1c) on top of phase 148: buildProjectSessionPrompt in sessionContext.ts (keep existing NAME/FOR_WHOM/CONSTRAINTS, interview for vision/Approach/Non-goals/Success, emit a heredoc contract to 'mini project --apply'), a 'project' branch in context.ts + CONTEXT_COMMANDS (no active phase needed), the CLI 'project' command (bare interactive via workWithClaude like discuss.ts + --apply reading stdin -> parseProjectContract -> readable error on null -> applyProject), a COMMAND_DEFS entry generating the /mini:project slash, docs/interactive/project.md, and the install-commands.test.ts snapshot (insert 'project.md' between 'plan.md' and 'status.md'). The conversation protocol for the session prompt is supplied by the user in /mini:discuss; fall back to a clearly marked placeholder per docs/design/mini-project.md only if not supplied. No model scope, no state.json writes, no status.ts changes.

steps.title: buildProjectSessionPrompt with 4-stage protocol
steps.detail: In sessionContext.ts add buildProjectSessionPrompt(projectMd): inline the current project.md, the distilled 4-stage interview (frame -> plan with pros/cons/alternatives -> non-goals as rules -> final check + Success), keep NAME/FOR_WHOM/CONSTRAINTS, heredoc contract template to 'mini project --apply'. Covered by a snapshot/unit test (contains the heredoc template and the 'read the existing project.md' instruction; no verbatim block dump).

steps.title: context project branch (no active phase)
steps.detail: In context.ts add 'project' to CONTEXT_COMMANDS and route it in context() before buildPhaseContext (no current phase needed); narrow buildPhaseContext's type to Exclude<ContextCommand,'next'|'verify'|'project'>. 'mini context project' prints the prompt.

steps.title: CLI project command + interactive session
steps.detail: cli.ts program.command('project'): --apply reads stdin -> parseProjectContract -> readable error + non-zero exit on null -> applyProject; bare runs an interactive workWithClaude session (new projectSession() in project.ts modeled on discuss.ts) with allowedTools including Bash. Manual: 'mini project --apply <<EOF...' updates project.md.

steps.title: COMMAND_DEFS entry + install snapshot
steps.detail: install/commands.ts COMMAND_DEFS 'project' (default body -> mini context project); update install-commands.test.ts expected list inserting 'project.md' between 'plan.md' and 'status.md'. install-commands tests pass.

steps.title: docs/interactive/project.md
steps.detail: Command docs modeled on init.md - what /mini:project does (enrich the existing project.md), the 4-stage flow, a note on the --apply contract.

steps.title: Green: npm test + npm run build
steps.detail: full suite passes (incl. updated snapshots) and the tsc build is clean.

resolvedVerify: Try the live /mini:project conversation and judge its quality
